main.description: Primary settings, statistics, and service-specific data (bot.db)

tables.user_personas: User persona analysis results and mentoring instructions (mentor_instruction)
tables.server_settings: Guild-specific log channels, vision models, and trigger settings
tables.usage: User-specific token usage, call counts, and cost statistics
tables.custom_slang: Server-specific custom abbreviations and slang dictionary

history.description: Large-scale conversation logs and session data (history.db)

tables.chat_logs: Conversation history from public Discord channels
tables.mentor_logs: 1:1 or session-based interaction logs between user and mentor bot
tables.mentor_sessions: Mentor conversation session metadata (title, active status)
